Specimen-type SNOMED that IS shipped in the export — SPEC_TYPE_SNOMED.TYPE_SNOMED_CT carries 119297000 for Blood specimens, keyed by ORDER_ID (joined to the resulted order via ORDER_PARENT_INFO; the SNOMED is the blood-draw source, valid only for genuinely Blood-typed specimens, matching src/lab.ts). The export omits only the SNOMED DISPLAY; that display is taken from the reference. Specimen natural key (ORDER_PROC_ID) -> SPEC_TYPE_SNOMED bridge
